scenarios.name: benign_baseline
scenarios.description: Stable baseline traffic with valid signatures.

scenarios.name: burst_failures
scenarios.description: Periodic bursts of invalid signatures to trigger blocking waves.

scenarios.name: malformed_signatures
scenarios.description: Probabilistic malformed signatures to simulate signer faults.

scenarios.name: replay_drifts
scenarios.description: Replay nonce drifts and epoch jitter to stress lineage continuity.

scenarios.name: high_volume_mutation_spikes
scenarios.description: Large mutation value spikes amid normal traffic.
